argv: set -e; mmls_ok=0; fsstat_ok=0; if grep -hE '^[[:space:]]*[0-9]+:' /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/_runlog/STEP-0-3.*.stdout 2>/dev/null | grep -vE 'Meta|-{3,}' | grep -q .; then mmls_ok=1; fi; if grep -qiE 'File System Type[[:space:]]*(Label[[:space:]]*)?:' /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/_runlog/STEP-0-3.*.stdout 2>/dev/null; then fsstat_ok=1; fi; if [ "$mmls_ok" -eq 1 ] || [ "$fsstat_ok" -eq 1 ]; then exit 0; fi; echo 'STEP-0-3 ASSERTION FAILED: mmls produced no parseable partitions AND fsstat at offset 0 did not detect a filesystem. Image is likely encrypted, corrupted, or in an unsupported container format.' >&2; exit 1

mkdir -p /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/registry && sudo -n cp '/mnt/image/Windows/System32/config/SYSTEM' /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/registry/SYSTEM 2>/dev/null || sudo -n cp '/mnt/image/WINDOWS/system32/config/SYSTEM' /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/registry/SYSTEM 2>/dev/null || true

sudo -n cp '/mnt/image/Windows/System32/config/SAM' /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/registry/SAM 2>/dev/null || true; sudo -n cp '/mnt/image/Windows/System32/config/SOFTWARE' /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/registry/SOFTWARE 2>/dev/null || true; sudo -n cp '/mnt/image/Windows/System32/config/SECURITY' /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/registry/SECURITY 2>/dev/null || true

while IFS= read -r f; do cp "$f" /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx/ 2>/dev/null || true; done < /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx/evtx_inventory.txt

for ch in Security System Application 'Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell%4Operational' 'Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon%4Operational' 'Microsoft-Windows-TerminalServices-LocalSessionManager%4Operational'; do test -f "/home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx/${ch}.evtx" && echo "PRESENT: $ch" || echo "ABSENT: $ch"; done

mkdir -p /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx_json && for f in /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx/*.evtx; do base=$(basename $f .evtx); evtx_dump.py -t json $f > /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx_json/${base}.jsonl 2>/dev/null || python3 -m evtx $f --format jsonl > /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx_json/${base}.jsonl 2>/dev/null || echo 'dump_failed' > /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx_json/${base}.jsonl; echo "dumped: $base"; done

jq -c 'select(.Event.System.EventID == 4625)' /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx_json/Security.jsonl > /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx_filtered/Security_4625_failed_logons.jsonl 2>/dev/null || touch /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx_filtered/Security_4625_failed_logons.jsonl && jq -c 'select(.Event.System.EventID == 4672)' /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx_json/Security.jsonl > /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx_filtered/Security_4672_priv.jsonl 2>/dev/null || true && jq -c 'select(.Event.System.EventID == 4720)' /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx_json/Security.jsonl > /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx_filtered/Security_4720_account_create.jsonl 2>/dev/null || true && jq -c 'select(.Event.System.EventID == 4698)' /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx_json/Security.jsonl > /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/evtx_filtered/Security_4698_task_create.jsonl 2>/dev/null || true

while IFS= read -r f; do [ -f "$f" ] && cat "$f" >> /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/web_logs/apache_access_combined.log 2>/dev/null || true; done < /home/sansforensics/Desktop/temporary_file_container/dfir_out_1/web_logs/web_log_inventory.txt || true
